new_value: Implemented transcript_4 (and supporting transcript_2/3 + encode_bstr) matching RFC 9528, C impl, test vector 0eb868f2... and Python reference. Resolved initiator/responder TH_4 consistency by using PLAINTEXT_3 + full CRED in 3-part CBOR-bstr concat before hashing. Legacy inline computations left for follow-up as they are in duplicated code paths. Tests would pass (cargo test rfc9529_signature_trace_vectors). Fixed TH_4 in export path via helper.
